name: Lincoln County
description_short: Member-owned credit union serving Lincoln County, Montana residents and employees with full-service banking, loans, and digital services.
description_long:
Lincoln County Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit financial cooperative based in Libby, Montana, serving individuals who live or work in Lincoln County. Founded on principles of promoting thrift through quality service, the institution operates as a federally-insured credit union under NCUA oversight, distinguishing it from traditional for-profit banks.

The credit union offers comprehensive financial services including multiple savings and checking accounts (including Kasasa Protect checking with rewards), auto loans, personal loans, mortgage loans, home equity options, student loan options, VISA credit cards, construction and land loans, business loans, and holiday loans. Members can access accounts through online banking, a mobile app with remote deposit capture, text banking at (406) 293-7771, and in-person at their Libby location (714 W. 6th Street).

Lincoln County CU distinguishes itself through membership-based governance, competitive loan rates, digital-first services including mobile check deposits and card management via SHAZAM's Brella app, and community focus on the specific Lincoln County service area. The institution emphasizes convenience with ATM access, 24/7 mobile transaction monitoring, and relatively modern fintech integrations compared to smaller regional credit unions.

As a credit union, members benefit from not-for-profit status and member-ownership structure, though membership eligibility is restricted to Lincoln County residents or employees. The institution appears well-capitalized and professionally managed, though no specific financial metrics, asset size, or customer satisfaction data is available from the website alone.
services: Savings accounts with Kasasa Protect option
Checking accounts with Kasasa rewards program
Home equity loans and lines of credit
Remote deposit capture via mobile app
Mobile banking app with card controls
pros: Free remote deposit capture service allowing check deposits via smartphone 24/7
Free mobile app with SHAZAM Brella card manager offering transaction monitoring, card pause, and purchase limits
Kasasa Protect checking accounts with rewards and no monthly fees
Text banking capability at (406) 293-7771 enabling most banking functions from phone
Diverse loan portfolio including auto, personal, mortgage, business, construction, and student loans
Member-owned cooperative structure with NCUA insurance protection
Competitive positioning as full-service alternative to traditional banks
cons: Membership restricted to Lincoln County, Montana residents or employees, limiting accessibility
Limited branch presence with only one physical location mentioned (Libby)
No specific loan rates or APRs published on website for rate comparison
Geographic limitation may restrict service appeal and convenience for non-local members
Limited information about account fees, minimum balances, or other terms on homepage
best_for: Lincoln County, Montana residents seeking membership-owned financial institution with digital banking
Local auto and mortgage borrowers wanting community-focused lending with competitive rates
Members preferring credit union structure over for-profit bank model for savings accounts
Businesses operating in Lincoln County needing business loan and commercial services
diagnosis: Best for Lincoln County, Montana residents and employees seeking member-owned credit union banking with modern digital services and competitive loans. Primary caveat is geographic membership restriction to Lincoln County and limited branch presence, making this unsuitable for out-of-area consumers or those requiring extensive physical branch networks.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
